issues.detail: Skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases in examples.
Docker image pulled without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Crash-safe payment workflow
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used BullMQ with a hand-rolled DB state table for idempotency; treatment used restate.service with each side effect in ctx.run and restate.endpoint().bind(...).listen(...) as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Trip-booking saga with compensation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline structured try/catch correctly but lacked durability primitives; treatment wrapped every booking and compensation in ctx.run inside a restate.service handler matching the skill's saga pattern.
